description:
A fantastic app to provide scroll lyrics for Spotify and other apps


1. [Add] Karaoke mode for Taskbar Lyrics.
2. [Add] Option to show track info only in Taskbar Lyrics.
3. [Fix] Optimize Taskbar Lyrics embedding and support automatic restart when the taskbar crashes.
4. [Fix] Fix some issues with Taskbar Lyrics area detection, custom max width, vertical adjustment, and more.
5. [Add] Color dithering in Isolation.
6. [Add] Option to enable FPS monitor for Apple Music Lyrics.
7. [Fix] QQ Music lyrics importation.
8. [Add] Option to enable Text Bitmap Cache in Dynamic Lyrics Island.
9. [Fix] Update info lines defination.
